description: Writing frameworks for Level 0 learners. Each framework provides a sentence-by-sentence template the learner fills in.

frameworks.name: Simple Sentences (Weeks 1-2)
frameworks.instruction: Write 3-5 simple sentences. Each sentence = Subject + Verb + Object/Detail.
frameworks.example_output: My name is Sara. I am from Egypt. I live in Cairo. I like reading books. I want to learn English.
checklist: Does every sentence have a subject?
Does every sentence have a verb?
Did you start with a capital letter?
Did you end with a period?

frameworks.name: Short Paragraph (Weeks 3-4)
frameworks.instruction: Write 4-6 sentences about ONE topic. Use time connectors to link your ideas.

structure.sentence_1: Topic sentence: state your main point

frameworks.example_output: Every morning I wake up at 6:30. First, I take a shower and brush my teeth. Then I eat breakfast with my family. After that, I get dressed and leave the house. I usually walk to work. I like mornings because they are quiet.
checklist: Did you write about ONE topic?
Did you use at least 2 connectors?
Are your sentences in logical order?
Is there a first sentence and a last sentence?

frameworks.name: Describe a Routine (Weeks 4-5)
frameworks.instruction: Write 5-7 sentences about something you do regularly. Include times and sequence words.
frameworks.example_output: I study English every evening. I start at 8 o'clock. First, I listen to a short audio clip and repeat. Then, I learn 8 new words and say each in a sentence. After that, I write 5 sentences about my day. I finish at 8:45. I feel good because I am getting better every day.

frameworks.name: Describe a Person (Weeks 3-5)
frameworks.instruction: Write 5-6 sentences about someone you know. Include: who, appearance, personality, what they do, your relationship.
template: I want to tell you about my ___.
frameworks.example_output: I want to tell you about my father. His name is Khalid. He is tall and strong. He is kind and hardworking. He works as a driver. I like him because he always helps our family.

frameworks.name: Express an Opinion (Weeks 5-6)
frameworks.instruction: Write 4-5 sentences giving your opinion about something. Include: your opinion + 2 reasons + a conclusion.
frameworks.example_output: I think learning English is very important. First, many jobs need English now. Also, I can talk to people from many countries. So, I believe every person should learn English.

frameworks.name: Write About the Past (Weeks 7-8)
frameworks.instruction: Write 5-7 sentences about something that happened. Use was/were and -ed verbs. Include when it happened and how you felt.
frameworks.example_output: Last Saturday, I visited my grandmother. I was happy to see her. First, we cooked lunch together. Then, we watched a movie. I felt relaxed because I love her house. It was a wonderful day.

progression_note: Weeks 1-2: Simple Sentences only. Week 3-4: Short Paragraph. Weeks 5-6: Opinion. Weeks 7-8: Past Event. Each builds on the previous — never skip ahead.
submission_channel: #writing-feedback (AI will evaluate and provide corrections within minutes)
